title: Ligation Sequencing Kit: Adapter Ligation and Clean-Up
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates the Adapter Ligation...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the Adapter Ligation and Clean-Up portion for preparing sequencing libraries in the Oxford Nanopore Ligation Sequencing Kit. There is a first part of this protocol for the [DNA Repair and End-Prep](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/516336). Explanation of parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Specify the number of samples in multiples of 8 (Max: 96). * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify the mount position of the P300 Multichannel. * `P300 Single GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify the mount position of the P300 Multichannel. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height from Well Bottom (mm)`: Specify the height of the magnets from the bottom of the well. ---

steps.title: Transfer master mix and put into...
steps.instruction: Transfer master mix and put into PCR plate, and mix each time.

steps.title: Transfer Samples from Sample PCR Plate...
steps.instruction: Transfer Samples from Sample PCR Plate to MIDI plate on Magnetic Module.

steps.title: Resuspend AMPure beads by pipette mixing...
steps.instruction: Resuspend AMPure beads by pipette mixing and transfer to MIDI plate on magnetic module.

steps.title: Pause for Hula Mixer and Spin Down the plate
steps.instruction: Pause for Hula Mixer and Spin Down the plate.

steps.title: Engage Magnetic Module for 5 minutes and then remove supernatant
steps.instruction: Engage Magnetic Module for 5 minutes and then remove supernatant.

steps.title: Wash the beads with fragment buffer (Long or Short)
steps.instruction: Wash the beads with fragment buffer (Long or Short). Mixing the buffer, engage magnetic module to allow beads to pellet and then remove supernantant.

steps.title: Pause and Spin Down the samples
steps.instruction: Pause and Spin Down the samples.

steps.title: Place on magnetic module and engage magnet for 1 minute
steps.instruction: Place on magnetic module and engage magnet for 1 minute.

steps.title: Disengage magnet and add 15 uL of elution buffer
steps.instruction: Disengage magnet and add 15 uL of elution buffer.

steps.title: Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Engage magnet for 5 minutes to...
steps.instruction: Engage magnet for 5 minutes to allow beads to pellet and the eluate is clear.

steps.title: Pause and remove old BioRad PCR...
steps.instruction: Pause and remove old BioRad PCR plate on Slot 2 with a new Bio Rad PCR Plate.

steps.title: Transfer 15 uL of eluate containing...
steps.instruction: Transfer 15 uL of eluate containing the new NDA library into the new BioRad PCR plate.
